message:
fix(kafka): close TOCTOU race in consumer seek, whitespace in producer

kafka_consumer.rs: Hold the state lock across validation and mutation
in seek() to prevent TOCTOU races where assignment state could change
between the subscription/assignment checks and the position update.
Also recheck closed status under the lock for consistency. Adds a test
verifying seek returns an error after the consumer is closed.

Formatting: reflow a long if-let condition for readability.

kafka.rs: Trailing whitespace cleanup only (no logic changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
